underlying_goal: Plan and document new roadmap phases (57.2, 57.3), update related project docs, and cleanly pause work with a handoff
friction_detail: The `gsd-tools phase insert` CLI only created the directory and detail section, requiring manual fixes to ordering, summary list, progress table, and phase count.
brief_summary: User wanted to add roadmap phases 57.2/57.3, update docs, and pause cleanly; achieved with manual workarounds for a CLI tooling gap.
